Your privacy matters. Use a VPN. Press ESC at any time to exit instantly.

العربية

Toward dignity, together.

A mutual aid collective by and for queer Iraqis. Information, community, and solidarity — in private.

Read the guides Join the community

Identity

Understanding who you are is the beginning, not the end. Explore resources on gender, sexuality, and self-acceptance.

Health

Practical, harm-reduction health information written for Iraqis by Iraqis. Including HRT access guides.

Safety

Digital security, VPN guidance, and practical safety planning for living in a hostile environment.

Who we are

The Iraqi Social Progress Collective is a grassroots mutual aid network for queer Iraqis and questioning people inside Iraq.

We are not a charity. We are not a media outlet. We are a community — distributed, encrypted, and built on trust.

Our work is privacy-first, by Iraqis and friends of Iraq, for Iraqis. We are not affiliated with any government, party, or foreign organization.

Iraqi Social Progress Collective

The Iraqi Social Progress Collective is a grassroots mutual aid network for queer Iraqis and questioning people inside Iraq.

Privacy

We do not track visitors. No cookies. No analytics.
